name: Double Chocolate Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and black pepper (if using). Set aside.
2. Melt shortening and unsweetened chocolate in a saucepan over low heat until smooth. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together brown sugar, egg, buttermilk, and vanilla until well combined.
4. Stir the cooled melted chocolate mixture into the egg mixture until smooth.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the saucepan, stirring continuously until all is incorporated.
6. Fold in semisweet chocolate chips and chopped walnuts (or macadamias).
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Allow to cool completely before storing; store airtight if not serving immediately.
